info.name: WST Backend - Community Waste Collection API
info.description:
Postman collection for the Community Waste Collection API (wst-backend).

Responses use a consistent envelope: success is {"data": ...} (list endpoints add {"meta": {page, per_page, total}}); errors are {"error": {code, message, details?}}.

Set the {{baseUrl}} variable (default http://localhost:8080) and the {{householdId}}/{{pickupId}}/{{paymentId}} variables after creating records. Every request includes saved success and error response examples.

item.name: Households
item.description: Create, list, fetch, and delete households. Deletion is refused (409) while pickups or payments still reference the household.

request.description: Create a household. owner_name and address are required.

originalRequest.description: Create a household. owner_name and address are required.
Paginated list. Query: page, per_page.
Paginated list. Query: page, per_page.
Fetch one household by id.
Fetch one household by id.

request.description: Delete a household. Refused while it still has pickups or payments.

originalRequest.description: Delete a household. Refused while it still has pickups or payments.

response.name: 409 Has Dependents

originalRequest.description: Delete a household. Refused while it still has pickups or payments.

item.name: Waste Pickups
item.description: Pickup lifecycle: pending -> scheduled -> completed, or canceled. Creation is rate-limited per IP and blocked (409) when the household has a pending payment. Electronic pickups require safety_check to schedule. Completing a pickup auto-creates a pending payment.

request.description: Create a pickup. type is required; safety_check is required for electronic.

originalRequest.description: Create a pickup. type is required; safety_check is required for electronic.
Create a pickup. type is required; safety_check is required for electronic.
Create a pickup. type is required; safety_check is required for electronic.

request.description: Filter by status and household_id; paginated.

originalRequest.description: Filter by status and household_id; paginated.

response.name: 400 Invalid Status Filter

request.description: Set pickup_date and move pending -> scheduled.

originalRequest.description: Set pickup_date and move pending -> scheduled.

response.name: 409 Pickup Not Pending

originalRequest.description: Set pickup_date and move pending -> scheduled.

response.name: 422 Safety Check Required

originalRequest.description: Set pickup_date and move pending -> scheduled.

request.description: Move scheduled -> completed and auto-create a pending payment in the same transaction.

originalRequest.description: Move scheduled -> completed and auto-create a pending payment in the same transaction.
Move scheduled -> completed and auto-create a pending payment in the same transaction.

request.description: Cancel a pending or scheduled pickup.

originalRequest.description: Cancel a pending or scheduled pickup.

response.name: 409 Pickup Not Cancelable

originalRequest.description: Cancel a pending or scheduled pickup.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Create a pending payment for a pickup (amount is server-derived from the pickup type), list with filters, and confirm by uploading a proof file. One payment per pickup (unique waste_id).

request.description: Create a pending payment. body: household_id, waste_id. amount is derived from the pickup type.

originalRequest.description: Create a pending payment. body: household_id, waste_id. amount is derived from the pickup type.

response.name: 409 Payment Already Exists

originalRequest.description: Create a pending payment. body: household_id, waste_id. amount is derived from the pickup type.
Create a pending payment. body: household_id, waste_id. amount is derived from the pickup type.

request.description: Filter by status, household_id, and a payment_date range (date_from/date_to, RFC3339).

originalRequest.description: Filter by status, household_id, and a payment_date range (date_from/date_to, RFC3339).

request.description: multipart/form-data with a single 'proof' file. Content type is validated by magic-byte sniffing; allowed: image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf.

originalRequest.description: multipart/form-data with a single 'proof' file. Content type is validated by magic-byte sniffing; allowed: image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf.

multipart/form-data with a single 'proof' file. Content type is validated by magic-byte sniffing; allowed: image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Read-only aggregations: pickups by type and status, payment totals and revenue, and a household's full pickup + payment history.

request.description: Pickups aggregated by type and status.

originalRequest.description: Counts and summed amounts by status; total_revenue counts paid payments only.
